terms.rationale: DeFi protocol name. Never translate.

Cryptographic algorithm name. Never translate. Must appear exactly as 'AES-256-GCM' in Chinese documentation. This is the internationally standardized algorithm identifier used verbatim across all languages.
Standard Chinese crypto term. 空 = air, 投 = drop/throw. Universal across all Chinese exchanges and crypto platforms.
Standard Chinese security/networking term. 白 = white, 名单 = list.
Widely used in Chinese DeFi content. AMM abbreviation kept in headings; 自动做市商 (automatic market maker) in definitions.
Standard Chinese financial term. APY abbreviation kept alongside Chinese equivalent.
Blockchain name. Never translate.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Cryptographic algorithm name. Never translate. Must appear exactly as 'Argon2id' in Chinese documentation.
Associated Token Account. Solana technical term. Keep English abbreviation.
Blockchain name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese financial term. 余额 = remaining amount.
Blockchain name (Coinbase L2). Never translate.
Bitcoin Improvement Proposal standard identifier. Never translate.
Bitcoin Improvement Proposal standard identifier. Never translate.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 区块 = block (in blockchain context).
Standard Chinese crypto term. 区块 = block, 浏览器 = browser/explorer.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 区块 = block, 链 = chain.
Standard Chinese security term. 黑 = black, 名单 = list.
NFT marketplace name. Never translate.
Blockchain/token name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese financial term.
Standard Chinese financial term. bps = basis points = 基点. 1 bps = 0.01%.

ethereum.org uses 链桥; Chinese crypto community predominantly says 跨链桥 (cross-chain bridge). Using 跨链桥 as it is more descriptive and more commonly encountered in Chinese DeFi content. Deviation from ethereum.org documented.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Short form of 'blockchain'. 链 = chain. Used in compound terms: 链上 (on-chain), 跨链 (cross-chain).
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Anthropic product name. Never translate.
Editor/agent product name. Never translate.
Central Limit Order Book. CLOB abbreviation kept in headings; full Chinese form in definitions.
Standard Chinese financial term. Source: academy.binance.com/zh/.
DeFi protocol name. Never translate.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Standard Chinese term. 确认 = confirm/confirmation.
Editor/agent product name. Never translate.
Editor/agent product name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese Unix/OS term. 守护 = guard/daemon, 进程 = process.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. Use DAO abbreviation in navigation and headings; 去中心化自治组织 (decentralized autonomous organization) on first occurrence in body text, DAO thereafter.
Dollar-cost averaging. 定投 = fixed investment / regular investment. Standard term in Chinese financial/crypto content.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. Keep 'DeFi' as-is in most contexts; use 去中心化金融 (decentralized finance) in definitions and first use.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Standard Chinese financial term. 存款 = deposit.
Solana development network identifier. Keep English.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. DEX abbreviation kept in headings; full form in definitions.

Seashail/MCP-specific term. No standard Chinese crypto term exists. 交互 (interactive) + 确认 (confirmation) describes the MCP user-prompt mechanism where the user must actively confirm. More descriptive than 请求输入 (request input).
Ethereum token standard identifier. Never translate.
Ethereum token standard identifier. Never translate.
Blockchain name. Never translate.
Ethereum Virtual Machine. Technical abbreviation. Keep English.
Standard Chinese crypto term for testnet token dispensers. 水龙头 = faucet (literal translation widely adopted).
Standard Chinese financial term. 手续费 = handling fee / transaction fee.
Source: coinglass.com/zh/. Universal term in Chinese perpetuals trading across all exchanges.

Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. Use 燃料 in educational/definitional contexts; keep 'Gas' in tool parameter names and UI labels where brevity is needed. Document dual-use: ethereum.org chose 燃料 for clarity; exchanges often keep 'Gas' for familiarity.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Standard Chinese term in both traditional finance and DeFi contexts. 治理 = governance.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Phonetic transliteration widely adopted in Chinese CS and crypto. 哈希 is universally understood.
Cryptographic algorithm name (HMAC-based Key Derivation Function). Never translate. Must appear exactly as 'HKDF' in Chinese documentation.
Perps exchange name. Never translate.

Source: academy.binance.com/zh/ and multiple Chinese DeFi platforms. 无常 = impermanent/transient (Buddhist-derived; fits the 'loss that may reverse' concept). Highly consistent across Chinese DeFi ecosystem.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Standard Chinese banking/finance term. 内部 = internal, 转账 = transfer.
Staking protocol name. Never translate.
DEX aggregator name. Never translate.
DeFi protocol name. Never translate.
Generic cryptographic key. 密钥 = cryptographic key. Note: specific forms have specific terms — private key → 私钥, public key → 公钥. Use 密钥 only in generic contexts.
Security-critical. 密钥 = cryptographic key, 存储 = storage. Compound term describing the encrypted storage for wallet keys. Standard in Chinese crypto wallet documentation.
Cross-chain protocol name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese financial term. 借贷 = lending/borrowing.
Standard Chinese financial term. 杠杆 = lever/leverage. Universal across Chinese exchanges.
Staking protocol name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese trading term. 限价 = limit price, 单 = order.

Colloquial Chinese term widely used in crypto trading. 爆仓 = position liquidation (lit. 'blown warehouse'). Note: 清算 is the formal term used in traditional finance. 爆仓 is more widely understood in Chinese crypto contexts.
Standard across ethereum.org, Binance Academy, and all Chinese financial content.
Source: academy.binance.com/zh/. 流动性 = liquidity, 池 = pool. Widely used.
Standard Chinese trading term. 多头 = long position (noun form). 做多 = go long (verb form). Standard across Chinese exchanges.
NFT marketplace name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese crypto term. 主 = main, 网 = network.
DeFi protocol name. Never translate.
Standard in Chinese exchanges. 标记 = mark, 价格 = price.
Standard Chinese trading term. 市价 = market price, 单 = order.
Standard Chinese term. 交易 = transaction/trade, 市场 = market.
Model Context Protocol. Technical protocol name. Never translate.
When used as verb (minting tokens): 铸造 (forge/mint). When referring to Solana token mint address, keep 'mint' in English as a technical identifier.
Security-critical. Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/ ('创建数字钱包时向你提供的单词列表'). 助记词 = mnemonic/memory-aid words. Same as 'seed phrase'. Universal across all Chinese wallet documentation.
Blockchain name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese tech term. 网络 = network, 模式 = mode.

Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. Use NFT abbreviation in navigation and headings; 非同质化代币 (non-fungible token) on first occurrence in body text, NFT thereafter.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 节点 = node (network node).
Standard Chinese cryptography term. 随机数 = random number. In transaction context, refers to sequential transaction counter.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
U.S. regulatory list name (Specially Designated Nationals). Keep English.
Product name. Never translate.
NFT marketplace name. Never translate.
Blockchain name. Never translate.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 预言机 = oracle (lit. 'prophecy machine'). Standard in all Chinese blockchain content.
DEX name. Never translate.
More common than 委托簿 in Chinese exchanges. 订单 = order, 簿 = book.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.

Security-critical. No ethereum.org entry. 密码短语 (secret-code short-phrase) is the standard rendering in Chinese cryptography/wallet documentation. Distinct from 口令 (generic password) which lacks the 'phrase' nuance. Distinct from 助记词 (mnemonic/seed phrase). Used consistently in Chinese versions of hardware wallet guides (Ledger, Trezor zh-CN).
Seashail-specific compound term. 密码短语 = passphrase (see above), 会话 = session. Describes the cached decryption key with TTL.
Universal in Chinese crypto. 永续 = perpetual, 合约 = contract/futures.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Standard Chinese financial term. 盈 = profit, 亏 = loss. PnL abbreviation kept alongside in technical contexts.
Short form of 'policy engine'. 策略 = policy/strategy. Standard Chinese enterprise/financial term.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Standard Chinese dev term. 策略 = policy/strategy, 上下文 = context.
Seashail product term. User decision (CONTEXT.md). 策略 = strategy/policy, 引擎 = engine. Standard Chinese enterprise software terminology.
Blockchain name. Never translate.
Prediction market platform name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese financial term. 投资 = investment, 组合 = combination/portfolio.
Standard Chinese trading term. 仓位 = position (in trading context). 仓 = warehouse/position, 位 = position/place.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Standard Chinese crypto/DeFi term. 价格 = price, 源 = source/feed.

Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 私 = private/secret, 钥 = key. Security-critical: mistranslation to 密钥 (generic cryptographic key) or 私人密钥 (less standard) would reduce clarity. 私钥 is the universally recognized Chinese term across all major exchanges and wallets.
在 Seashail 文档中特指 `seashail mcp` 进程，使用“代理进程”可与 AI 智能体（agent）区分。
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. Security-critical. 公 = public, 钥 = key. Standard across all Chinese crypto platforms.
Platform name. Never translate.
DEX name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese financial term. 再 = re-, 平衡 = balance.
Standard Chinese term. In transaction context, 交易收据 = transaction receipt.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Standard Chinese tech term. 远程 = remote, 交易 = transaction.
Remote Procedure Call. Technical abbreviation. Keep English.
Compound: 诈骗 = scam, 地址 = address, 黑名单 = blocklist.
Product/brand name. Never translate.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Security-critical. Same as 'mnemonic'. Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 助记词 = memory-aid words. Universal in Chinese wallet documentation.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Security-critical. Shorthand for Shamir's Secret Sharing. Same translation. 沙米尔 = phonetic transliteration of Shamir. 秘密分享 = secret sharing. See also: 'Shamir's Secret Sharing'.

Security-critical. No ethereum.org entry. 沙米尔 = phonetic transliteration of Shamir. 秘密分享 = secret sharing (established Chinese cryptography term). The 2-of-3 threshold scheme is referenced as '(2, 3) 秘密分享方案' in Chinese academic cryptography literature. Alternative: 'Shamir秘密分享' keeping the name in English - both acceptable; 沙米尔秘密分享 chosen as it reads more naturally in Chinese prose.
Security-critical. In context of Shamir Secret Sharing. 密钥 = key, 分片 = shard/fragment. Standard in Chinese MPC/Shamir implementations.
Standard Chinese trading term. 空头 = short position (noun form). 做空 = go short (verb form). Standard across Chinese exchanges.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/ uses 数字签名 (digital signature). 签名 = signature. Use 数字签名 in formal definitions, 签名 in general contexts.
Standard in Chinese trading contexts. Source: Binance, OKX, Bybit all use 滑点. 滑 = slip, 点 = point.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 智能 = smart, 合约 = contract.
Blockchain name. Never translate.
Solana Program Library. Technical standard. Keep English abbreviation.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 稳定 = stable, 币 = coin.
Verb form of 'staking'. 质押 = pledge/stake. Same Chinese rendering as 'staking'. Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency. Also a core crypto term: source ethereum.org/zh/glossary/.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 质押 is the standard Chinese financial term for pledging assets as collateral/security. Used universally across Chinese exchanges.
Standard I/O. Technical computing term. Keep English.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Token exchange operation. 兑换 = exchange/swap. Same Chinese rendering as 'Swapping' section heading.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
NFT marketplace name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese crypto term. 测试 = test, 网 = network.
Standard Chinese enterprise/finance term. 分级 = tiered/graded, 审批 = approval.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 代币 = token (representative coin). Universal in Chinese crypto.
Seashail/MCP 语境下，envelope 指携带调用参数的载荷对象；“工具调用载荷”表意更明确。
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 交易 = transaction/trade.
Seashail product term. User decision (CONTEXT.md). 交易 = transaction, 守卫 = guard.
Standard Chinese financial term. 转 = transfer, 账 = account.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Total Value Locked. Standard in Chinese DeFi. TVL abbreviation kept alongside.
DEX name. Never translate.
Standard Chinese financial term. 美元 = USD, 价值 = value. Used in Seashail policy context for spending limit evaluation.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. 验证 = verify, 者 = person/one who.
Editor/product name. Never translate.
Source: ethereum.org/zh/glossary/. Universal in all Chinese crypto platforms. 钱 = money, 包 = bag/pouch.
Section heading translation for Phase 9 navigation consistency.
Editor/agent product name. Never translate.
在链上/协议语境中统一使用“提取”，与“充值/存入”形成稳定对照。
Cross-chain protocol name. Never translate.
Shorthand for 'write operation'. Same translation. Standard Chinese dev term. 写 = write, 操作 = operation. See also: 'write operation'.
Standard Chinese dev term. 写 = write, 操作 = operation.
Standard Chinese financial term. 收益 = yield/returns.
Source: academy.binance.com/zh/. 流动性 = liquidity, 挖矿 = mining. More common than 收益农业 (yield agriculture) in Chinese DeFi content.
Rust security crate name and technique. Never translate. Must appear exactly as 'zeroize' in Chinese documentation. Refers to secure memory clearing to prevent key material leakage.
